result.notes: Race fix: ensureTestAppRole() now wraps role DDL in a txn serialized by pg_advisory_xact_lock + idempotent CREATE-IF-NOT-EXISTS/GRANT/ALTER, so parallel callers no longer race pg_authid tuples. Role stays NOLOGIN NOBYPASSRLS. turbo.json test task set cache:false (DB-integration depends on live external state turbo can't key on; stale cache was masking the failure). RLS guard asserting pg_roles.rolbypassrls=false still passing. No RLS weakening, no DB mocking. Rebuilt @cdp/db so authorizer picks up fixed helper.
result.testSummary: Iteration 2 (determinism fix). 4 consecutive COLD-cache runs all green (0 cached, 27/27 tasks each). Integration tier ran every time (not skipped): rls-isolation(5), workspace-switch-rescope(1), per-workspace-uniqueness(2), admin-audit(3), service-role-scoping(3); 67 unit. Original 'tuple concurrently updated' failure reproduced first, then fixed.
